subject: Commonly Used Discrete Random Variables
topic: §21 Poisson Approximation to the Binomial Distribution
question: Let $X$ be a binomial distribution with parameters $n = 200$ and $p = 0.02$. We want to calculate $\Pr(X \ge 2)$. Explain why a Poisson distribution can be expected to give a good approximation of $\Pr(X \ge 2)$ and then find the value of this approximation.
